name: dhh-vibecoding
description: Vibecoding with the DHH philosophy. 16 skills distilled from 37signals' Fizzy, Campfire, and Writebook — zero build tools, no devise, no Sidekiq, no Redis. Teaches Claude Code to write Rails 8 + Hotwire + Solid Suite + Kamal apps the DHH way. Main skills cover PRD writing, Rails conventions, Turbo, Stimulus, Tailwind, auth, Active Storage, Solid Suite, Kamal, Mayar payments, RubyLLM. Extras skills cover vanilla CSS (DHH-style) and advanced VPS hardening (Tailscale + Cloudflare).
